# Chada Digital - Technical Summary

Chada Digital is a high-performance digital agency website and demo platform.

## Architecture & Tech Stack
- **Framework:** TanStack Start (Beta) on React 19.
- **Routing:** TanStack Router (type-safe, file-based).
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS 4.0 (@theme directives).
- **State:** TanStack Query v5.
- **Components:** Radix UI / shadcn/ui.
- **Logic:** Server Functions (createServerFn) for type-safe backend ops.

## Key Directories
- \`src/routes/\`: File-based routing & page components.
- \`src/routes/demos/\`: Isolated demo brand experiences (e.g., Sterling & Vale).
- \`src/components/ui/\`: Reusable Radix-based UI primitives.
- \`src/lib/api/\`: Server-side function definitions.
- \`src/lib/config.server.ts\`: Server-only environment configuration.

## Features
- Full SSR with custom error recovery for h3 engine.
- Multi-brand support with isolated design systems in sub-routes.
- Automated sitemap generation at \`/sitemap.xml\`.
- Type-safe end-to-end communication.

## Development Patterns
- Use \`createServerFn\` for any logic requiring secrets.
- Use \`cn()\` utility for Tailwind class merging.
- Follow Tailwind 4 CSS-first configuration in \`src/styles.css\`.
